temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a dimly lit, green-hued room, a man with glasses is seen in profile. He holds a gold and silver Rolex watch in his hands, examining it closely. He speaks, stating that it has been four years since someone died, and the time is now right. (Storyline: The scene opens with a mysterious and ominous tone. The man's dialogue reveals a significant past event (a death) and suggests that a pre-arranged plan is about to be set in motion.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Calm, deliberate, and slightly menacing. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous hum begins to build.)
(00:03-00:05) The man places the gold and silver Rolex watch face down on a dark surface. The camera zooms in on the watch, revealing the 'ROLEX OYSTER PERPETUAL FRIDAY' inscription on the white dial as the hands spin. (Storyline: The focus on the expensive watch, specifically a Friday datejust, reinforces the character's wealth and precision. The spinning hands add a sense of urgency and mechanical finality.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, electronic whirring sound is heard as the watch hands spin, followed by a sharp, percussive sound.)
